title: Dark Snow
description: a small, low quality texture pack that turns snow darker for the sake of any individual's eyes when night strikes.
body:
This texture pack exists to fix a single problem I have: Snow biomes burn my eyes when its late at night, so I spent like 40 minutes making a pack to make snow darker and I wish to share it with you all! if you found this useful then.. uhh.. tell your friends or somthin!

If this texture pack breaks on higher versions (ex: 26.1) I'll try to update it but 0 guarantees, shouldn't break anyways as its very simple, anyways kbai have a good day :D
